description: Make the auto/loop result schema and docs express an executable command train: route/status/preflight, claim/create, inspect, build/verify, recheck/devil, finish, reflect, continue.
acceptance: go auto output makes clear the agent must execute a chain, not hand commands back to Viggo.
Contract includes continue-until rules, budget, blocker taxonomy, and checkpoint semantics.

evidence.summary: Documented bare-go autonomous loop contract; updated vision/principles, README, router docs, runtime skill, CLI loop contract, and tests; verification passed: python3 cli/go.py validate ., make check, pytest -q, git diff --check
